description: vLLM version eras for the code-map indexer. Paths move between versions; the indexer resolves each area's layout for the requested tag.

eras.label: V0 engine era
eras.note: Engine logic in vllm/engine, vllm/core, vllm/worker, vllm/executor. V1 (vllm/v1) does not exist or is experimental.

eras.label: V1 engine era
eras.note: V1 (vllm/v1) becomes the default engine. Scheduler, KV cache, worker, attention, sampler move under vllm/v1. The legacy V0 tree still exists alongside until it is removed around 0.11.x.

how_to_read: Each area in areas.jsonl lists one or more layouts with optional `since`/`until` version bounds. The first layout whose range contains the requested version wins; `latest` resolves to the newest (V1) layout.
